case.title: STANDARD INDUSTRIES INC. v. TIGRETT INDUSTRIES, INC.

opinion.h1: STANDARD INDUSTRIES INC. v. TIGRETT INDUSTRIES, INC., 386 U.S. 1048 (1970)
opinion.h2: STANDARD INDUSTRIES, INC., petitioner, v. TIGRETT INDUSTRIES, INC., et al. No. 445.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Ralph W. Kalish, on the motion.
The motion of respondents to remove this case from the summary calendar is denied.[ Standard Industries Inc. v. Tigrett Industries, Inc. 386 U.S. 1048 (1970) ]
